subcodes.first_line: Wonder upon wonder and astonishment upon astonishment, that this evanescent and lost one, in the beginning of supplications, letters and treatises [3.5s]... ...My God, my God! I beseech Thee by the station wherein Thy most sweet voice calleth aloud,and by the horizon from which the luminary of Thy Cause doth shine forth
subcodes.first_line_orig: حیرت اندر حیرت و عجب اندر عجب که اینفانی مفقود در اول عرایض و مکاتب و رسائل
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @justice and wrath of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
